schedule: # Matrix schedules place each ROW's data across fixed COLUMNS. pypdf can't extract these reliably
# so they are transcribed from the form here. header=1 -> grouping row (no data). header=0 with
# 3 cells -> a 3-column matrix row. header=0 with 1 cell (colA only) -> a single-value row.
# Codes are bare 4-char MDRM item codes; the BHCK/BHDM/... prefix is resolved via the dictionary.
# Column labels are set per schedule in build_hierarchy_fry9c.py (MATRIX_COLS).
